steps.title: Registry metadata is live
steps.command: npm view proofloop@0.1.0 name version license dependencies author dist.tarball --json

steps.title: Published npx doctor runs from a clean directory
steps.stdoutTail:
Proof Loop doctor -- environment + readiness

  [OK  ] node v22.22.2 (need >= 20)
  [OK  ] git on PATH
  [MISS] inside a git repo
  [OK  ] worker "claude" -> C:\Users\hshum\.local\bin\claude.exe
  [OK  ] worker "codex" -> C:\Users\hshum\nodejs\codex
  [----] .claude/ present
  [----] proofloop hooks installed
  [MISS] proofloop.config.json present

Here's what's missing before the loop is fully wired:
  - this directory is not a git repo (run `git init`)
  - proofloop.config.json (run `proofloop init`)

steps.title: Published npx help runs from a clean directory
steps.stdoutTail:
proofloop -- bring any coding agent; Proof Loop makes it prove the app works.

Usage: proofloop <command> [options]

Commands:
  init                       detect the app + write a starter proofloop.config.json
  doctor                     environment + readiness report
  gate [--check]             run gate.checks (exit 0 pass / 1 fail / 2 unusable)
  hooks install|uninstall|status   Claude Code Stop/PreToolUse/PostToolUse hooks
  tooluse verify|init        expected-tool-use contracts
  ci install github          write the GitHub Actions gate workflow
  prompt                     print the one-prompt kickoff
  this-repo [--goal <text>]  guided local-loop setup (drives YOUR agent honestly)

Global options:
  --dir <path>               operate on this repo root (default: cwd)

Commands: init, doctor, gate, hooks, tooluse, ci, prompt, this-repo

steps.title: Stranger repo is independent git state
Published npx init detects Vite
steps.stdoutTail:
proofloop init: detected Vite (package.json depends on vite).
proofloop init: wrote <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\proofloop.config.json

Next steps:
  1. Add real proof checks to proofloop.config.json gate.checks, e.g.:
       { "name": "build", "command": "npm run build" }
       { "name": "tests", "command": "npm test" }
  2. Run `proofloop doctor` to confirm you're ready.
  3. Paste `proofloop prompt` into your coding agent, then run `proofloop gate` to prove the work.
  4. `proofloop hooks install` to make your agent refuse fake "done".

steps.title: Published npx gate passes through npm-test fallback
steps.stdoutTail:
proofloop gate: no checks configured; falling back to `npm test` (package.json has a test script).
proofloop gate: running check "npm test" -> npm test

> stranger-vite-proofloop-e2e@0.0.0 test
> node -e "process.exit(0)"

proofloop gate: check "npm test" PASSED (773ms, exit 0)
proofloop gate: PASSED
  state: <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.proofloop\gate-state.json
  ts:    2026-07-05T05:50:37.128Z
  source: npm-test-fallback
  checks:
    - [pass] npm test (773ms)

steps.title: Published npx installs Stop and tool-use hooks
steps.stdoutTail:
proofloop hooks: installed into <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.claude\settings.json
  stop-gate:        <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.proofloop\hooks\stop-gate.mjs (added)
  pretooluse-guard: <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.proofloop\hooks\pretooluse-guard.mjs (added)
  posttooluse-log:  <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.proofloop\hooks\posttooluse-log.mjs (added)
The Stop hook refuses fake "done" until `proofloop gate` passes.

> node -e "process.exit(1)"

steps.title: Generated Stop hook blocks fake done while gate is failing
steps.stdoutTail: {"decision":"block","reason":"proofloop gate is failing: npm test: failing. Continue working: fix the failures, then re-run the gate. (block 1/5)"}

steps.title: Generated PreToolUse guard blocks forged proof-state writes
steps.stderrTail: proofloop guard: BLOCKED edit to protected proof state ".proofloop/gate-state.json" (matches ".proofloop/"). This path is gitignored or enforcement-critical, so git diff cannot review the change; it may only change through the proofloop CLI.

proofloop tooluse: trace file not found: <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.proofloop\tooluse\log.jsonl. Run `proofloop hooks install` so the PostToolUse logger captures tool calls, or pass --trace <file>.
proofloop tooluse: contract or trace unusable -- refusing to report a verdict (fail-closed, exit 2).

steps.title: PostToolUse logger records a redacted forbidden call
Tool-use verifier fails on forbidden tools and missing required tools
steps.stdoutTail:
tool-use contract: FAIL
  contract: <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\tooluse-contract.json
  trace:    <temp>/proofloop-npx-package-proof-1783230622761-f46c6b69e4e53\stranger-vite-repo\.proofloop\tooluse\log.jsonl
  session:  (all sessions)
  calls=1 matchedRequired=0/2 malformedLines=0
  violations:
    - [missing_required] mcp__composio__GMAIL_FETCH_EMAILS: expected >= 1 call(s) on MCP server "composio", found 0 (triage must actually read the inbox through the Composio MCP server)
    - [missing_required] mcp__composio__GMAIL_SEND_EMAIL: expected >= 1 call(s) on MCP server "composio", found 0 (exactly one summary email, to a real address)
    - [forbidden_called] GITHUB_CREATE_ISSUE: call #0 matches forbidden rule /GITHUB_.*/: email triage must not touch repos
